name: Brand Impersonation Monitoring
description: Monitors for brand impersonation by detecting fake domains, lookalike websites, and phishing pages mimicking the organization. When a brand impersonation alert is received, the playbook analyzes the suspicious domain for similarity to legitimate brand assets, enriches with WHOIS and hosting data, uses AI to confirm impersonation and assess risk, then initiates takedown procedures for confirmed cases. The registrar is contacted, the domain is added to blocklists, and affected users are warned.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Analyze the fake domain for known malicious indicators, page content, and hosting details

required_integrations.name: urlscan.io
required_integrations.reason: Capture live screenshots and DOM content of the impersonating page for evidence collection

config.description: Triggers when a brand monitoring service detects a potential impersonation domain or lookalike website
Calculates domain similarity using Levenshtein distance to quantify how closely the suspicious domain mimics legitimate brand domains
Enriches the suspicious domain with VT reputation, WHOIS registration details, and live page capture via urlscan

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the suspicious domain against the legitimate brand. Consider domain similarity score, page content analysis, WHOIS registrant details, hosting infrastructure, and visual similarity. Confirm whether this is active brand impersonation and assess the risk to customers and employees.
config.description: AI-powered analysis confirming brand impersonation by correlating domain similarity, page content, and hosting data
Routes based on whether AI analysis and domain similarity confirm active brand impersonation
Blocks the impersonation domain on DNS and web proxy to protect internal users

create_ticket.title: TAKEDOWN: Brand Impersonation — {{code_1.outputs.result.suspicious_domain}}

config.description: Creates a takedown request ticket for the legal/security team to contact the registrar and file abuse reports

notify.subject: BRAND IMPERSONATION: {{code_1.outputs.result.suspicious_domain}} — Takedown Initiated
notify.message:
A confirmed brand impersonation has been detected and response actions initiated.

Fake Domain: {{code_1.outputs.result.suspicious_domain}}
Similarity: {{code_1.outputs.result.similarity_score}}%

Actions Taken:
- Domain blocked internally
- Takedown request filed

AI Assessment:
{{analyze_2.summary}}

config.description: Notifies security and brand protection teams about the confirmed impersonation and actions taken
Documents the negative impersonation result and places the domain in monitoring
